approvalNote: Repair pass for Davy and Pirate Marshal after the first West Country / pirate audition batch failed strict word matching on the opening phrase.

pirate_marshal.role: Lighter British pirate character option after Captain Blackbeard was rejected

davy_sailor.role: Friendly British sailor/story voice; nautical without full pantomime pirate

takes.speaker: storybook_narrator
takes.text: Barnaby longed for glory on the tide; his crew brought tape, a bucket, and their pride. The task was plain: sail out and ring the bell. The plan, however, did not age so well. Then came the show beside the dock, and gave the mayhem rhythm, rules, and clock.
takes.title: Jury Rigged Barnaby Boat - West Country Pirate Repair
